name: personal-finance
description: Tax analysis and wealth planning tools for solopreneurs and business owners.

plugins.name: personal-finance
plugins.description: Client-facing tax analysis and planning for business owners. Upload an IRS transcript for instant situation review and optimization opportunities, run tax estimates with actionable recommendations, compare S-Corp vs Schedule C with implementation roadmaps, and build 5-year projections with year-by-year action plans.
